deterministic_issues.text: Verb 'стрів' (VESUM: verb:perf:past:m) in pre-verb module M5. Verbs are forbidden before M15.
deterministic_issues.fix: Replace verb 'стрів' with an English equivalent or a noun phrase. Students haven't learned verbs yet.
Change 'се' to match the gender/case of 'перенос', or vice versa.
Change 'сільський' to match the gender/case of 'сіль', or vice versa.
